# Kunal Ahuja

## Who
Kunal Ahuja is the founder of Sports Card Invest, a platform helping collectors and investors navigate the sports card market with data-driven research and analysis.

## Background
- Bay Area native, started investing in sports cards at 18
- Grew Sports Card Invest to 1,300+ paying members in first 3 months
- Built a following of 200,000+ across social platforms
- Members historically averaged 60% monthly returns on card investments

## What He Does
- Publishes bi-weekly investment reports covering basketball, football, and other sports
- Runs a consignment service partnered with Fanatics Collect
- Hosts the Sports Card Invest podcast on Spotify
- Published an audiobook on Audible
- Creates video content on YouTube (@sportscards)

## Expertise
- Sports card market analysis and valuation
- Player performance correlation to card pricing
- Card grading and authentication
- Portfolio management for collectibles
- Community building and newsletter publishing

## Links
- Website: https://kunalahuja.com
- Sports Card Invest: https://sportscardsinvest.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kunal-ahuja-92679a93/

- YouTube: @sportscards
- Business inquiries: jason@fanarch.com
